flow_points: England started strong, scoring 56 runs for 2 wickets in the Powerplay (RR 9.33).
WG Jacks anchored England's innings, contributing 26.2% of the team's runs.
England achieved a high-scoring finish in the Death Overs (RR 15.6), shifting match momentum.
Italy's chase began poorly, losing 3 wickets in the Powerplay and scoring only 47 runs (RR 7.83), failing to build a stable foundation.
J Overton delivered a crucial spell of 4.0 overs for 18 runs, taking 3 wickets, sustaining defensive pressure.
SM Curran also delivered a vital spell, taking 3 wickets for 22 runs in 3.0 overs.
Italy struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 100.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
